member.name: M:Fantomas.Queue`1.SkipExists(System.Int32,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{`0,System.Boolean},Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{`0[],System.Boolean})
member.summary: Equivalent of q |> Queue.toSeq |> Seq.skip n |> Seq.skipWhile p |> Seq.exists f, optimized for speed

member.name: T:Fantomas.Queue`1
member.summary: append only collection optimized for quick append of block of data and query operations data - list of blocks in reverse order

member.name: M:Fantomas.CodeFormatter.ParseAsync(System.String,Fantomas.SourceOrigin.SourceOrigin,FSharp.Compiler.CodeAnalysis.FSharpParsingOptions,FSharp.Compiler.CodeAnalysis.FSharpChecker)
member.summary: Parse a source string using given config

member.name: M:Fantomas.CodeFormatter.IsValidFSharpCodeAsync(System.String,Fantomas.SourceOrigin.SourceOrigin,FSharp.Compiler.CodeAnalysis.FSharpParsingOptions,FSharp.Compiler.CodeAnalysis.FSharpChecker)
member.summary: Check whether an input string is invalid in F# by looking for erroneous nodes in ASTs

member.name: M:Fantomas.CodeFormatter.GetVersion
member.summary: Returns the version of Fantomas found in the AssemblyInfo

member.name: M:Fantomas.CodeFormatter.FormatSelectionAsync(System.String,FSharp.Compiler.Text.Range,Fantomas.SourceOrigin.SourceOrigin,Fantomas.FormatConfig.FormatConfig,FSharp.Compiler.CodeAnalysis.FSharpParsingOptions,FSharp.Compiler.CodeAnalysis.FSharpChecker)
member.summary: Format a part of source string using given config, and return the (formatted) selected part only. Beware that the range argument is inclusive. If the range has a trailing newline, it will appear in the formatted result.

member.name: M:Fantomas.CodeFormatter.FormatDocumentAsync(System.String,Fantomas.SourceOrigin.SourceOrigin,Fantomas.FormatConfig.FormatConfig,FSharp.Compiler.CodeAnalysis.FSharpParsingOptions,FSharp.Compiler.CodeAnalysis.FSharpChecker)
member.summary: Format a source string using given config

member.summary: Format an abstract syntax tree using an optional source for trivia processing

member.name: M:Fantomas.RangeHelpers.range contains(FSharp.Compiler.Text.Range,FSharp.Compiler.Text.Range)
member.summary: Checks if Range B is fully contained by Range A

member.name: M:Fantomas.SourceParser.|Extern|_|(FSharp.Compiler.Syntax.SynModuleDecl)
member.summary: A rudimentary recognizer for extern functions Probably we should use lexing information to improve its accuracy

member.name: M:Fantomas.SourceParser.|FunType|(FSharp.Compiler.Syntax.SynType,FSharp.Compiler.Syntax.SynValInfo)
member.summary: Extract function arguments with their associated info

member.name: M:Fantomas.SourceParser.skipGeneratedLambdas(FSharp.Compiler.Syntax.SynExpr)
member.summary: Process compiler-generated matches in an appropriate way

member.name: M:Fantomas.SourceParser.|DotGetApp|_|(FSharp.Compiler.Syntax.SynExpr)
member.summary: Gather series of application for line breaking

member.name: M:Fantomas.SourceParser.|DotGetAppParen|_|(FSharp.Compiler.Syntax.SynExpr)
member.summary: Match function call followed by Property

member.name: M:Fantomas.SourceParser.|CompExprBody|_|(FSharp.Compiler.Syntax.SynExpr)
member.summary: Matches if the SynExpr has some or of computation expression member call inside.

member.name: M:Fantomas.SourceParser.|LetOrUses|_|(FSharp.Compiler.Syntax.SynExpr)
member.summary: Unfold a list of let bindings Recursive and use properties have to be determined at this point

member.name: M:Fantomas.SourceParser.|PrefixApp|_|(FSharp.Compiler.Syntax.SynExpr)
member.summary: Only process prefix operators here

member.name: M:Fantomas.SourceParser.|App|_|(FSharp.Compiler.Syntax.SynExpr)
member.summary: Get all application params at once

member.summary: This pattern is escaped by using OpName

member.name: P:Fantomas.SourceParser.|ArrayOrList|_|
member.summary: Combines all ArrayOrList patterns

member.name: M:Fantomas.SourceParser.|Quote|_|(FSharp.Compiler.Syntax.SynExpr)
member.summary: isRaw = true with <@@ and @@>

member.name: M:Fantomas.SourceParser.|MFMember|MFStaticMember|MFConstructor|MFOverride|(FSharp.Compiler.Syntax.SynMemberFlags)
member.summary: This pattern finds out which keyword to use

member.name: M:Fantomas.SourceParser.|OpNameFull|(Fantomas.SourceParser.Identifier)
member.summary: Operators in their declaration form

member.name: M:Fantomas.SourceParser.|OpName|(Fantomas.SourceParser.Identifier)
member.summary: Use infix operators in the short form

member.name: M:Fantomas.SourceParser.|IdentOrKeyword|(FSharp.Compiler.Syntax.Ident)
member.summary: Different from (|Ident|), this pattern also accepts keywords

member.name: P:Fantomas.SourceParser.noBreakInfixOps
member.summary: Never break into newlines on these operators

member.name: P:Fantomas.SourceParser.newLineInfixOps
member.summary: Always break into newlines on these operators

member.name: P:Fantomas.SourceParser.noSpaceInfixOps
member.summary: Don't put space before and after these operators

member.summary: Tokenize a single line of F# code

member.name: P:Fantomas.Context.Context.Content
member.summary: The original source string to query as a last resort

member.name: P:Fantomas.Context.Context.Default
member.summary: Initialize with a string writer and use space as delimiter

member.name: P:Fantomas.Context.WriterModel.Column
member.summary: current length of last line of output

member.name: P:Fantomas.Context.WriterModel.Mode
member.summary: dummy = "fake" writer used in `autoNln`, `autoNlnByFuture`

member.name: P:Fantomas.Context.WriterModel.WriteBeforeNewline
member.summary: text to be written before next newline

member.name: P:Fantomas.Context.WriterModel.AtColumn
member.summary: helper indentation information, if AtColumn > Indent after NewLine, Indent will be set to AtColumn

member.name: P:Fantomas.Context.WriterModel.Indent
member.summary: current indentation

member.name: P:Fantomas.Context.WriterModel.Lines
member.summary: lines of resulting text, in reverse order (to allow more efficient adding line to end)

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.colWithNlnWhenItemIsMultiline(Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{Fantomas.Context.ColMultilineItem},Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary:
This helper function takes a list of expressions and ranges. If the expression is multiline it will add a newline before and after the expression. Unless it is the first expression in the list, that will never have a leading new line. F.ex. let a = AAAA let b = BBBB BBBB let c = CCCC
will be formatted as: let a = AAAA
let b = BBBB BBBBB
let c = CCCC

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.isMultilineItem(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context},Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: Checks if the events of an expression produces multiple lines of by user code. Leading or trailing trivia will not be counted as such.

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.unindentOnWith(Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: Conditional unindentation on with keyword

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.indentOnWith(Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: Conditional indentation on with keyword

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.noNln(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context},Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: Skip all auto-breaking newlines

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.colAutoNlnSkip0``1(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{``0,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context}})
member.summary: Similar to col, skip auto newline for index 0
Similar to col, skip auto newline for index 0

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.exceedsWidth(System.Int32,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context},Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: similar to futureNlnCheck but validates whether the expression is going over the max page width This functions is does not use any caching

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.autoIndentAndNlnIfExpressionExceedsPageWidth(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context},Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: try and write the expression on the remainder of the current line add an indent and newline if the expression is longer

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.leadingExpressionIsMultiline``1(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context},Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{System.Boolean,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,``0}},Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: A leading expression is not consider multiline if it has a comment before it. For example let a = 7 // foo let b = 8 let c = 9 The second binding b is not consider multiline.

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.leadingExpressionLong``1(System.Int32,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context},Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{System.Boolean,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,``0}},Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: combines two expression and let the second expression know if the first expression was longer than a given threshold.
provide the line and column before and after the leadingExpression to to the continuation expression

member.summary: opening token of list

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.rep(System.Int32,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context},Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: Repeat application of a function n times

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.onlyIf``1(System.Boolean,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{``0,``0},``0)
member.summary: apply f only when cond is true

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.ifElse(System.Boolean,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context},Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context},Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: b is true, apply f1 otherwise apply f2
Similar to opt, but apply f2 at the beginning if there is a value

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.optSingle``2(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{``0,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{``1,``1}},Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{``0},``1)
member.summary: similar to opt, only takes a single function f to apply when there is a value

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.opt``1(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context},Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{``0},Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{``0,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context}},Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: If there is a value, apply f and f' accordingly, otherwise do nothing
Similar to col, but apply two more functions fStart, fEnd at the beginning and the end if the input sequence is bigger thn one item
Similar to col, apply one more function f2 at the beginning if the input sequence is not empty
Similar to col, apply one more function f2 at the end if the input sequence is not empty

Process collection - keeps context through the whole processing calls f for every element in sequence and f' between every two elements as a separator. This is a variant that works on typed collections.
Similar to coli, and supply index as well to f'
Similar to col, and supply index as well

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.str``1(``0,Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: Print object converted to string

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.op_PlusTwiddle(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context},System.String,Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: Break-line unless we are on empty line

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.op_MinusMinus(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context},System.String,Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: Append specified string without line-break

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.op_PlusMinus(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context},System.String,Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: Break-line if config says so

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.op_PlusPlus(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context},System.String,Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: Break-line and append specified string

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.op_PlusGreater(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context},Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context},Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: Function composition operator

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.atCurrentColumnIndent(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context},Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: Write everything at current column indentation, set `indent` and `atColumn` on current column position /// Example (same as above): { X = // indent=2, atColumn=2 "some long string" // indent=6, atColumn=2 Y = 1 // indent=2, atColumn=2 } `atCurrentColumn` was called on `X`, then `indent` was called, "some long string" have indent 6, because it is indented from `atCurrentColumn` pos (2).

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.atCurrentColumnWithPrepend(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context},Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context},Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: Like atCurrentColumn, but use current column after applying prependF

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.atCurrentColumn(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context},Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: Set minimal indentation (`atColumn`) at current column position - next newline will be indented on `max indent atColumn` Example: { X = // indent=0, atColumn=2 "some long string" // indent=4, atColumn=2 Y = 1 // indent=0, atColumn=2 } `atCurrentColumn` was called on `X`, then `indent` was called, but "some long string" have indent only 4, because it is bigger than `atColumn` (2).

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.atIndentLevel(System.Boolean,System.Int32,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Fantomas.Context.Context,Fantomas.Context.Context},Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: Apply function f at an absolute indent level (use with care)

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.decrIndent(System.Int32,Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: Decrease indent by i spaces

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.incrIndent(System.Int32,Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: Increase indent by i spaces

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.unindent(Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: Unindent one more level based on configuration

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.indent(Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: Indent one more level based on configuration

member.name: M:Fantomas.Context.newlineBetweenLastWriteEvent(Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: Validate if there is a complete blank line between the last write event and the last event

member.name: M:Fantomas.SourceTransformer.|PropertyWithGetSet|_|(Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{FSharp.Compiler.Syntax.SynBinding})
member.summary: Gather PropertyGetSet in one printing call. Assume that PropertySet comes right after PropertyGet.

member.name: M:Fantomas.SourceTransformer.hasParenthesis(FSharp.Compiler.Syntax.SynExpr)
member.summary: Check if the expression already has surrounding parentheses

member.name: P:Fantomas.CodePrinter.ASTContext.IsInsideMatchClausePattern
member.summary: Inside a SynPat of MatchClause

member.name: P:Fantomas.CodePrinter.ASTContext.IsFirstTypeParam
member.summary: First type param might need extra spaces to avoid parsing errors on `<^`, `<'`, etc.

member.name: P:Fantomas.CodePrinter.ASTContext.IsUnionField
member.summary: A field is rendered as union field or not

member.name: P:Fantomas.CodePrinter.ASTContext.IsNakedRange
member.summary: Range operators are naked in 'for..in..do' constructs

member.name: P:Fantomas.CodePrinter.ASTContext.IsCStylePattern
member.summary: This pattern matters for formatting extern declarations

member.name: P:Fantomas.CodePrinter.ASTContext.InterfaceRange
member.summary: Current node is a subnode deep down in an interface

member.name: T:Fantomas.CodePrinter.ASTContext
member.summary: This type consists of contextual information which is important for formatting Please avoid using this record as it can be the cause of unexpected behavior when used incorrectly

member.name: M:Fantomas.CodePrinter.genMemberDefnList(Fantomas.CodePrinter.ASTContext,Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{FSharp.Compiler.Syntax.SynMemberDefn})
member.summary: Each multiline member definition has a pre and post new line.

member.name: M:Fantomas.CodePrinter.genPropertyKeyword(System.String,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{FSharp.Compiler.Syntax.PropertyKeyword},Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: Generate the keyword and or with, along with any matching syntax trivia, for a given keyword
member.param: the keyword that the user wants for the property after writing.
the parsed keyword range for the property from the AST. this is used to lookup trivia based on its range, since this range can differ from the output keyword's range.
the writing context context, not used inside this function
member.remarks: The output keyword and input keyword can be different in the case of a property where the getter and setter are defined separately. Fantomas will combine the definitions, each of which are defined as member blah with get, member blah with get, into a combined getter and setter on a single member. This means that one of the with must be rewritten as an and, but we need to preserve the trivia.
member.returns: A function that will transform and rewrite the member property keywords.

member.name: M:Fantomas.CodePrinter.genAttributes(Fantomas.CodePrinter.ASTContext,Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{FSharp.Compiler.Syntax.SynAttributeList})
member.summary: Try to group attributes if they are on the same line Separate same-line attributes by ';' Each bucket is printed in a different line

member.name: M:Fantomas.CodePrinter.addFinalNewline(Fantomas.Context.Context)
member.summary: Respect insert_final_newline setting

member.name: M:Fantomas.CodeFormatterImpl.makePos(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Make a position at (line, col) to denote cursor position

member.name: M:Fantomas.CodeFormatterImpl.formatSelection(FSharp.Compiler.CodeAnalysis.FSharpChecker,FSharp.Compiler.CodeAnalysis.FSharpParsingOptions,FSharp.Compiler.Text.Range,Fantomas.FormatConfig.FormatConfig,Fantomas.CodeFormatterImpl.FormatContext)
member.summary: Format a part of source string using given config, and return the (formatted) selected part only. Beware that the range argument is inclusive. If the range has a trailing newline, it will appear in the formatted result.

member.name: M:Fantomas.CodeFormatterImpl.stringPos(FSharp.Compiler.Text.Range,System.String)
member.summary: Convert from range to string positions

member.name: M:Fantomas.CodeFormatterImpl.getPatch(System.Int32,System.String[])
member.summary: Find the first type declaration or let binding at beginnings of lines

member.summary: Find out the end token

member.summary: Find out the start token

member.name: M:Fantomas.CodeFormatterImpl.getStartLineIndex(System.String[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Get first non-whitespace line

member.name: M:Fantomas.CodeFormatterImpl.makeRange(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Make a range from (startLine, startCol) to (endLine, endCol) to select some text

member.name: M:Fantomas.CodeFormatterImpl.formatAST(FSharp.Compiler.Syntax.ParsedInput,Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{System.String},Fantomas.CodeFormatterImpl.FormatContext,Fantomas.FormatConfig.FormatConfig)
member.summary: Format an abstract syntax tree using given config

member.name: M:Fantomas.CodeFormatterImpl.formatDocument(FSharp.Compiler.CodeAnalysis.FSharpChecker,FSharp.Compiler.CodeAnalysis.FSharpParsingOptions,Fantomas.FormatConfig.FormatConfig,Fantomas.CodeFormatterImpl.FormatContext)
member.summary: Format a source string using given config

member.name: M:Fantomas.CodeFormatterImpl.isValidFSharpCode(FSharp.Compiler.CodeAnalysis.FSharpChecker,FSharp.Compiler.CodeAnalysis.FSharpParsingOptions,Fantomas.CodeFormatterImpl.FormatContext)
member.summary: Check whether an input string is invalid in F# by looking for erroneous nodes in ASTs

member.name: M:Fantomas.CodeFormatterImpl.isValidAST(FSharp.Compiler.Syntax.ParsedInput)
member.summary: Check whether an AST consists of parsing errors
